meta.description: nlmixr2 FOCEI joint PK/PD warfarin reference for openpkpd external validation
meta.model: Joint 4-state warfarin PK/PD model with PK and PD endpoints routed by DVID
meta.parameterisation: KTR/KA/CL/V/EMAX/EC50/KOUT/E0 with PK add+prop error and PD additive error
meta.notes: This mixed-endpoint benchmark is intended for the first empirical DVID-routed external validation path.
